usage: checkPinAssignment [-help] [-outFile <fileName>] [-reportSameNetPinAsOverlap] [-reportUncoloredViolation] [<topCellName> | -ptn <partitionName list> ] [-ptn <partitionName list> | {-pin_file <fileName> [-exclude_ptn <string>]} | -exclude_pin_file <fileName>] [ -report_violating_pin ] [-ignore {bus_guide net_group pin_abutment pin_depth pin_group pin_guide pin_layer pin_min_area pin_on_fence pin_on_track pin_spacing pin_spacing_constraint pin_spacing_routeBlk pin_width clones logical_pin pin_color unplaced} ] [ [-preCheck [-skipCheck {overlap layer spacingConstraint fixedIoPins multiTermNet masterClone netGroup connection relativeOrientRelation gridTrackAlignment symmetryOffset masterCloneSize alignZone}] [-excludeNetFile <fileName>] ] | { [-ptn <partitionName list>] [-pin {pinName list}] [-pin_file <fileName>] [-exclude_pin_file <fileName>] [-ignore {bus_guide net_group pin_abutment pin_depth pin_group pin_guide pin_layer pin_min_area pin_on_fence pin_on_track pin_spacing pin_spacing_constraint pin_spacing_routeBlk pin_width clones logical_pin pin_color unplaced}] [-report_violating_pin ] [-exclude_ptn <string>] } ]

options.name: -exclude_pin_file
options.description: Specify pin-list to be excluded for partition in a file

options.name: -exclude_ptn
options.description: Specifies the list of exluded partition for pin-file

options.name: -ignore
options.description: {bus_guide net_group pin_abutment pin_depth pin_group pin_guide pin_layer pin_min_area pin_on_fence pin_on_track pin_spacing pin_spacing_constraint pin_spacing_routeBlk pin_width clones logical_pin pin_color unplaced} Check and report one category from the list of type of checks.

options.name: -outFile
options.description: Print the output in the specified file (default file is <design_name>.checkPin.rpt)

options.name: -pin_file
options.description: Specify pin-list for partition in a file

options.name: -reportSameNetPinAsOverlap
options.description: Report the pins (connected to same net) placed at same location and same layer as overlap violation

options.name: -reportUncoloredViolation
options.description: Check and report uncolored pin as violation

options.name: -report_violating_pin
options.description: Reports all the pins with violation.

options.name: -skipCheck
options.description: {overlap layer spacingConstraint fixedIoPins multiTermNet masterClone netGroup connection relativeOrientRelation gridTrackAlignment symmetryOffset masterCloneSize alignZone} Skip checking the category from the list of type of checks.
